changeSet.author: nexus-146xx.5
changeSet.comment: nexus.remap_membership(p_source_collection, p_target_collection) RETURNS TABLE(mapped_total bigint, present_count bigint). SECURITY INVOKER — RLS scopes both the map read and the chunk probes to the stamped tenant. Live computation, no stored verdict (RF-186-1).
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.remap_membership( p_source_collection text, p_target_collection text ) RETURNS TABLE(mapped_total bigint, present_count bigint) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $fn$ SELECT count(*)::bigint AS mapped_total, count(*) FILTER (WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM nexus.chunks_384 c WHERE c.collection = p_target_collection AND c.chash = r.new_chash) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM nexus.chunks_768 c WHERE c.collection = p_target_collection AND c.chash = r.new_chash) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM nexus.chunks_1024 c WHERE c.collection = p_target_collection AND c.chash = r.new_chash) )::bigint AS present_count FROM nexus.chash_remap r WHERE r.source_collection = p_source_collection AND r.target_collection = p_target_collection $fn$;
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.remap_membership(text, text)

changeSet.author: nexus-146xx.5
changeSet.comment: GRANT EXECUTE on remap_membership to nexus_svc (catalog-004 pattern)
changeSet.sql: GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION nexus.remap_membership(text, text) TO nexus_svc;
changeSet.rollback: REVOKE EXECUTE ON FUNCTION nexus.remap_membership(text, text) FROM nexus_svc;
